channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Fin de OnePlus en Europe : restructuration, suivi clientèle tout ce qu’il faut savoir
item.description: La marque OnePlus en Europe connaît de nouvelles turbulences avec un futur incertain. Les informations que nous avons reçues évoquent une restructuration mais qu'en est-il réellement ? Voici notre récapitulatif complet de la situation du constructeur chinois.

item.title: An Editor’s Picks: The Best Gifts for Bird Lovers
item.description: Whether they’re into feeders, field guides, or games, these tried-and-tested picks are sure to land perfectly.

item.title: ICYMI: the 8 biggest tech stories of the week, from new Moto foldables to electric air taxis
item.description: Missed some of the big stories that have appeared on TechRadar this week? Not any more, you haven't.

item.title: C’est l’occasion ou jamais de plonger sur le Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra puisque sa version 512 Go est 600 € moins chère
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra est un smartphone très complet que ce soit grâce à sa dalle AMOLED ultra-lumineuse ou son puissant Snapdragon 8 Gen 3. Pendant les French Days, il chute à 999 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: Microsoft tranche : 32 Go de RAM, le « confort » obligatoire pour jouer en 2026
item.description: Microsoft a discrètement mis à jour ses recommandations matérielles pour Windows 11 et tranche : 32 Go de RAM, c'est le palier « tranquillité ». Le timing, lui, est un peu cruel : la DDR5 n'a jamais coûté aussi cher.

item.title: The Mother's Day Gifts Our Editors Love (2026)
item.description: From smart rings and everlasting flowers to weighted vests and LED masks, there's a gift for every kind of mom.

item.title: From F1 sets to new Botanicals plants, these are the best new Lego sets of May
item.description: We rounded up the best new Lego sets available to purchase as of May 1, including a Lewis Hamilton helmet and Cristiano Ronaldo themed-set.

item.title: Why Does Wikipedia Think I’m Evan Spiegel?
item.description: For the past week, a photo of me has been plastered on the CEO of Snap’s Wikipedia page. No one, not even Spiegel, seems to care.

item.title: 'No other smartwatch has this feature': the Apple Watch's most innovative running feature is one you've probably never used
item.description: Apple uses GPS and Apple Maps data to implement a cool hidden feature.

item.title: This free website is like Wikipedia meets the CIA
item.description: Fact-check the planet with this free community-run resource based on the abandoned CIA ‘World Factbook.’ You may or may not have ever realized it, but for more than six decades, the CIA published an incredible resource called The World Factbook​. It was a free reference guide to all the countries on Earth, along with several non-state entities such as the European Union, and it was filled with all sorts of eye-opening info....

item.title: Stop letting ChatGPT and other AI chatbots train on your data. Here’s why—and how
item.description: Whatever you feed them can become public. Keep that in mind, and take these steps to protect yourself. When you interact with a chatbot, there’s a good chance that everything you say, and every prompt you give, isn’t just used to generate replies to your queries. Nearly every chatbot company on the planet also uses the information you provide to train its AI models. This can leave your privacy—and even your employer’s confidential information—exposed. But you can mitigate these privacy risks by telling chatbots not to use your data for training. Here’s how....

item.title: The Lost Boys: A New Musical: Phenomenal, frightening, and not to be missed
item.description: The Joel Schumacher cult classic gets a rock-and-roll revamp. (Get it? Vamp. Because they're vampires.)

item.title: The DJI Mini 5 Pro drone is $500 off right now at Amazon — save on this content creator favorite
item.description: The DJI Mini 5 Pro Fly More Combo is on sale for $1,099 at Amazon, saving you $500 on list price.

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to claim
item.description: How to get free iPhone. Get the Apple iPhone 17 for free from T-Mobile when you switch and bring your number on an Experience Beyond or Better Value plan.

item.title: Put multiple AI models to work at once with this $80 tool
item.description: Upgrade your AI workflow with a lifetime subscription to 1min.AI's Advanced Business Plan.

item.title: Upgrade your laptop without overspending thanks to this $430 MacBook Pro
item.description: Bring home this Apple MacBook Pro for only $429.97.

item.title: This $100 Microsoft Office 2024 deal won’t bill you next month
item.description: Save on Microsoft Office 2024 Home and Business with this lifetime license deal, now $99.97 (reg. $249.99) for a limited time.

item.title: AdultFriendFinder vs. FetLife: Which is better for exploring specific kinks?
item.description: Here are the major differences in how AFF and FetLife cater for kinks. Comparison of sex-positive communities.

item.title: Where NASAs Dragonfly mission is going, We dont need roads
item.description: NASA's 2028 Dragonfly mission will explore Saturn moon Titan with an aircraft rather than a rover. Here's why flying beats driving.

item.title: 2026 Summer TV preview: Every TV show you need to know about now
item.description: From "House of the Dragon" and "Ted Lasso" to "Spider-Noir" and "Lanterns," here's what's coming to TV this summer.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 Madrid Open online for free
item.description: How to watch the Madrid Open for free. Live stream the 2026 Madrid Open for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to unblock Pornhub for free
item.description: How to unblock porn for free. Unblock and watch Pornhub for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: J’ai testé le clavier Hator Skyfall 80 MAG Ultima 8K Wireless : le bon plan magnétique à moins de 100 euros
item.description: La marque ukrainienne Hator élève son jeu avec le Skyfall 80 MAG Ultima 8K Wireless, un clavier 80 % doté d’interrupteurs à effet Hall, proposé sous la barre symbolique des 100 euros.

item.title: Comment Toto, connu pour ses toilettes japonaises, est devenu un fournisseur indispensable des fabricants de mémoire NAND
item.description: Le fabricant japonais de toilettes Toto vient de bondir de 18 % en Bourse. Pas grâce à ses cuvettes chauffantes, mais à une obscure division céramique devenue indispensable à la fabrication des puces mémoire qui font tourner l'IA.

item.title: Coup dur pour Hadopi : la riposte graduée de l’Arcom viole les lois européennes
item.description: Le Conseil d’État a enterré encore un peu plus le dispositif Hadopi en annulant plusieurs piliers juridiques de la riposte graduée. Cette décision est motivée par des violations des normes européennes concernant la protection des données personnelles.

item.title: Cyberattaques en France : les dernières fuites de données et entreprises touchées
item.description: Les cyberattaques continuent de se multiplier en France. De nombreuses entreprises se sont retrouvées dans le viseur des cybercriminels. Ces attaques ont abouti au vol des données personnelles de la plupart des Français. Ci-dessous, on fait le point sur les dernières victimes et l'évolution de la situation.
